sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR, tags ARRAY<VARCHAR>);
SELECT id, regexp_escape(url) AS escaped_url FROM test_table WHERE escaped_url && regexp_escape(tags[1]) OR id IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS tag_count FROM test_table GROUP BY url HAVING tag_count > 0 AND regexp_escape(url) && ['http', 'query'] ;
SELECT id, url FROM (SELECT id, url, regexp_escape(url) AS escaped FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE escaped IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(CASE WHEN url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING null_count = 2;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, tags FROM test_table WHERE tags && ['http', 'example'] AND id < 3;
SELECT id, regexp_escape(tags[1]) AS escaped_tag FROM temp_table WHERE escaped_tag IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
SELECT t1.id, t1.url FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN temp_table AS t2 ON t1.id = 1 AND t2.id IS NOT NULL WHERE t1.url != '' AND regexp_escape(url) && tags;
